NSCameraUsageDescription: ULinks needs camera access to take photos for posts, avatars, and messages.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ULinks needs photo library access to select images for posts, avatars, and messages.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ULinks needs microphone access to record voice messages.
NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: ULinks needs speech recognition access to convert voice to text.
